productDisplayName: Wrangler Women's Feel Good Navy Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionNavy blue V-neck, short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with gathers at the neckline, elasticated at mid-waist and has a distressed chest printFittingComfortWash care Handwash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Celebrating the popularity of the radio show Special Blues, this navy blue top from wrangler has a happy spirit. Replete with a distressed chest print for a retro feel, the gathers at the neckline and the elasticated gathers at the waistline to accentuate your waist enhancing your feminine look. Team this with skin-tight jeans and ballerina flats for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
